name: awatif
description: The First Open-source Structural Analysis and Design Software
author: Mohamed Adil

scripts.build:wasm: emcc ./components/analysis/l-solver/cpp/lSolver.cpp -o ./components/analysis/l-solver/cpp/built/lSolver.js -O3 -s ASSERTIONS -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH -s MODULARIZE -s EXPORT_ES6 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_malloc,_free,_lSolve -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=HEAPF64,HEAPU32,HEAPU8,HEAP32 -I /Users/mohamed/Applications/eigen/
